Stablecoin CLI
Scriptable CLI for the Stablecoin API covering payments, wallets, balances, apps, projects, contracts, compliance workflows, and API key management.

Install: npm install -g @stablecoin/cli
Auth: set STABLECOIN_API_KEY, or run stablecoin config set-key <api-key>, or pass --api-key <key>.
Environment: sandbox by default. Override with STABLECOIN_ENV or --env sandbox|production.
Global flags: --json for machine-readable output, --env sandbox|production, --api-key <key>.
Exit codes: 0 on success, 1 on error. Errors are printed to stderr.
Agent guidance: prefer --json, use --api-key for ephemeral auth, validate mutating commands in sandbox before production.

config set-key <api-key>: Save an API key to ~/.stablecoin/config.json.
config set-env <sandbox|production>: Save the default environment.
config show: Print the current config with the API key partially redacted.

payments create --amount <amount> --stablecoin <USDC|USDT|DAI> --to <address> --chain <chain>: Create a payment.
payments get <payment-id>: Fetch one payment.
payments list: List payments.

wallets create --chain <ethereum|polygon|base|solana> [--label <name>]: Create a wallet.
wallets get <wallet-id>: Fetch one wallet.
wallets list: List wallets.
wallets balances <wallet-id>: List balances for one wallet.

balances: List balances across all wallets.

apps list: List apps.
apps get <app-id>: Fetch one app.
apps create --name <name> [--template <slug>] [--description <text>]: Create an app.
apps deploy <app-id> [--env sandbox|staging|production]: Deploy an app.
apps delete <app-id>: Delete an app.
apps templates: List app templates.

projects list: List projects.
projects get <project-id>: Fetch one project.
projects create --name <name> [--description <text>]: Create a project.
projects delete <project-id>: Delete a project.
projects deployments list <project-id>: List deployments for a project.

contracts generate --spec <json|@file.json> [--style minimal|production|auditable]: Generate Solidity from a spec.
contracts validate --source <solidity|@file.sol> [--contract-name <name>] [--min-score <0-100>]: Validate a contract.
contracts compile --source <solidity|@file.sol> [--contract-name <name>] [--compiler <version>] [--optimizer-runs <n>]: Compile a contract.
contracts simulate --source <solidity|@file.sol> [--contract-name <name>] [--chain base|base-sepolia]: Simulate a contract.
contracts deploy --abi <json|@file.json> --bytecode <hex> [--chain base|base-sepolia]: Deploy a compiled contract.
contracts launch --spec <json|@file.json> [--style minimal|production|auditable] [--chain base|base-sepolia] [--deploy false]: Generate, validate, compile, and deploy a contract.
contracts verify --address <0x...> --chain <base|base-sepolia> --source <solidity|@file.sol> --contract-name <name>: Verify a deployed contract.

compliance approvals list [--my-queue] [--status pending|approved|rejected|expired|cancelled]: List approval requests.
compliance approvals get <approval-id>: Fetch one approval request.
compliance approvals create --chain <chain-id> --risk-score <0-100> [--risk-level low|medium|high|critical] [--estimated-cost <amount>] [--required-approvals <n>] [--deadline-hours <n>]: Create an approval request.
compliance approvals decide <approval-id> --action approve|approve_conditional|reject [--comment <text>] [--conditions <csv>]: Decide an approval request.
compliance licenses list [--status <status>]: List licenses.

api-keys list [--env sandbox|production]: List API keys.
api-keys create --name <name> --tier basic|professional|enterprise [--env sandbox|production] [--expires-in 30d|90d|1y]: Create an API key.
api-keys revoke <api-key-id> [--env sandbox|production]: Revoke an API key.
